purpose: Pause the current HKJC B+ attempt after PR-144 and start the next candidate path with JRA. This file is not a calendar input and does not promote any records.

hkjc_decision.resume_condition: Resume only if new official-source evidence verifies every remaining June 2026 HKJC meeting.

next_candidate_decision.jra_start_scope: official source inventory and route investigation only

forward_schedule.goal: List official JRA source candidates. No promotion.
Define checks for JRA official pages or payloads. No promotion.
Record whether one JRA meeting can expose complete time rows from official sources.
If PR-148 succeeds, create a one-meeting snapshot.
If PR-148 fails, pause JRA and move to NAR inventory.
If JRA one-meeting succeeds, test wider coverage.
Create a wider snapshot only if source coverage is complete.
Promote JRA only if the PR-132 rank rules are satisfied.

global_safety_rules: Do not promote HKJC to B+ from the current evidence set.
Do not infer first_race_time without source-verified rows.
Do not infer last_race_time without source-verified rows.
Do not infer race_count without a complete source-verified list.
Do not add public A-rank detail UI during this route work.
